findings.answer_body: Based on these records, the archive view is a source-linked research archive for graphic design and visual communication records. It organizes records through folders/topology: India, Modern typography and layout, Graphic design object record, Unresolved region, Midcentury modern graphic communication, Lithographic print. Surface types in the packet: sheet. Publication roles in the packet: main_sheet. Source families represented: Wikimedia Commons file source / East India postage Queen Victoria stamp used in Zanzibar - One anna brown, 1865.jpg / page 63346338, Wikimedia Commons file source / East India postage Queen Victoria stamp used in Zanzibar- Two annas orange, 1865.jpg / page 633463
